prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~1.2 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.9 kg; Height 154.5 cm; BMI 24.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.8%; 9 months ago 6.9%; 6 months ago 6.4%; 3 months ago 6.7%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 160mg/dL; 9 months ago 157mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 170mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.3kg; 9 months ago 58.3kg; 6 months ago 57.7kg; 3 months ago 57.7kg; current 57.9kg), Height (12 months ago 154.5cm; 9 months ago 154.5cm; 6 months ago 154.5cm; 3 months ago 154.5cm; current 154.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 61U/L; 9 months ago 59U/L; 6 months ago 57U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 64U/L), AST (12 months ago 56U/L; 9 months ago 58U/L; 6 months ago 51U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 58U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 93mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; current 94mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 41mg/g; 9 months ago 51mg/g; 6 months ago 40mg/g; 3 months ago 50mg/g; current 45mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 76mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 36mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 155mg/dL; 9 months ago 140mg/dL; 6 months ago 154mg/dL; 3 months ago 155mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 16.0g/dL; 9 months ago 15.2g/dL; 6 months ago 15.0g/dL; 3 months ago 15.0g/dL; current 15.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
